2.reason: invalid array declaration (zero-size array) - causes compilation error and undefined behavior

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Array size is zero, cannot store any characters. This will cause undefined behavior when reading input.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Array size is zero, cannot store any characters. This will cause undefined behavior when reading input.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  invalid array declaration (zero-size array) - causes compilation error and undefined behavior
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Declaring an empty array of size 0 is invalid in C. This causes undefined behavior and compilation error in some compilers.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Invalid array declaration: an empty initializer without a specified size violates C syntax rules and causes a compilation error. It should be declared with a fixed size, e.g., char s[1000];.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Invalid array declaration: an empty initializer list without a specified size causes a compilation error. It should be declared with a sufficient size, e.g., char s[1000];
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The array 's' is declared with empty initializer, which is invalid in C for global arrays without explicit size or initialization. This causes a compilation error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The array 's' is declared with empty initializer, which is invalid in C and leads to a compilation error. It must have a size or be initialized with elements.]

5.reason: Error: Using scanf with %s on a zero-size array leads to buffer overflow and undefined behavior.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Using scanf with %s on a zero-size array leads to buffer overflow and undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Using scanf with %s on a zero-size array leads to buffer overflow and undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Using scanf with an empty array leads to buffer overflow and undefined behavior. Should allocate a fixed size array (e.g., char s[1000]).

15.reason: Error: Potential out-of-bounds access when i is 0 or i is the last index. Also, missing else clause to print '-' when condition fails.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Potential out-of-bounds access when i is 0 or i is the last index. Also, missing else clause to print '-' when condition fails.

35.reason: Error: Missing 'else' block to print the '-' character when none of the expansion conditions are met. The program incorrectly omits the hyphen in such cases.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Missing 'else' block to print the '-' character when none of the expansion conditions are met. The program incorrectly omits the hyphen in such cases.
